productDisplayName: Levis Men Classics Gothic Mustard Shirt
description: Composition Mustard and purple check shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with two button cuffs, a spread collar, buttoned placket, pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not use bleach Use warm iron This Levi's cotton shirt traces a relaxed silhouette flattering all body shapes to make you look your casual best. This off-duty essential is a must-have for the modern urban male. Pair it with denims and suede shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6', chest 39& rdquo and shoulders 18"
